data.title: India's Mangalore Refinery sees busiest day since July 2024
data.description:
** Shares of Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals rise 6.8% to 119.70 rupees

** Trading volume at 35.9 mln shares, over 17x the 30-day average

** Reuters could not immediately ascertain the reason behind day's move

** Stock among top gainers on Nifty 500 index (.NIFTY500)

** MRPL down ~19% in 2025 vs 11.5% gains in 2024

data.title: US Stocks Brief: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick Slated To Meet With Canadian Officials Today Amid Trade War
Street View: Adobe's AI revenue, new subscription segments to drive long-term growth
data.description:
** Photoshop maker Adobe Inc forecast second-quarter revenue in line with Wall Street expectations on Wednesday, as it grapples with slower monetization of its AI offerings while facing tough competition from startups

** Shares of ADBE down ~4.7% at $418.03 in premarket trading

AI PAVES THE WAY

** Wolfe Research ("outperform", PT: $575) believes co will succeed in AI and benefit from new subscription segments like business professionals, consumers and creative & marketing professionals, to create a "clearer narrative" moving forward

** TD Cowen ("hold", PT: $490) sees progress in co's GenAI revenue, but notes "it is still too small to move the needle on overall growth & we think primary focus is still on adoption vs. monetization"

** Morgan Stanley ("overweight", PT: $600) sees potential for growth in creative and marketing professionals with products like GenStudio and Firefly Services; adds longer sales cycles might slow near-term growth

** J.P.Morgan ("overweight", PT: $540) sees additional levers driving steady annual recurring revenue (ARR) growth long term, including pricing tailwinds, converting free-to-paid subscribers from its large user base and inorganic contributions

data.title: Duluth Holdings CEO Samuel M. Sato to Retire >DLTH
CAB Payments Needs to Deliver Sustained Growth to Boost Shares — Market Talk
data.description: CAB Payments Holdings shares will likely remain weak until the fintech group delivers consistent growth, Peel Hunt analysts Gautam Pillai and Barun Singh write in a note. The London-listed company's 2024 results were overall weak, the analysts say. The group reported a double-digit percentage fall in key metrics, reflecting a transition year. However, market opportunities and the strong value proposition in emerging markets cross-border payments remain unchanged, the analysts add. Shares are down 5.6% at 50.60 pence. (najat.kantouar@wsj.com)

data.title: U.S. Energy Corp. Reports Financial and Operating Results for Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2024
data.description:
U.S. Energy Corporation, a growth-focused energy company engaged in operating a portfolio of high-quality producing assets, has released its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. The company has made significant strides in its industrial gas project in Montana, alongside other notable financial and operational achievements.

Financial Highlights

For the full year 2024, U.S. Energy reported total revenue of $20.6 million, with oil sales contributing $18.2 million and natural gas and liquids sales adding $2.5 million. The company achieved an Adjusted EBITDA of $3.6 million. However, it reported a net loss of $25.8 million, primarily due to an $11.9 million impairment of oil and natural gas properties and a $5.0 million loss on the sale of assets.

In the fourth quarter of 2024, revenue totaled $4.2 million, with oil sales at $3.6 million and natural gas and liquids sales at $0.6 million. The company generated an Adjusted EBITDA of $0.4 million for the quarter.

Business and Operational Highlights

U.S. Energy's total daily production in 2024 averaged 1,136 Boe/d, with oil production averaging 702 Bbl/d. The company continued its divestment of legacy non-core assets, generating $13.5 million in net sales proceeds. Lease operating expenses decreased by 27% from 2023, totaling $11.2 million or $26.83 per Boe.

In the fourth quarter, total daily production averaged 971 Boe/d, with oil production at 595 Bbl/d. Lease operating expenses for the quarter were $1.8 million or $20.58 per Boe, a significant decrease from the third quarter of 2024.

Strategic Initiatives and Corporate Developments

The company successfully completed an underwritten public equity offering in January 2025, raising net proceeds of approximately $12.1 million. U.S. Energy also continued its $5.0 million share repurchase program, repurchasing 0.6 million shares during 2024, and a total of 1.67 million shares when combined with YTD 2025 activity.

U.S. Energy's Montana industrial gas project saw significant progress, with the acquisition of over 160,000 acres in 2024 and early 2025. The company plans to continue its development activities in 2025, including the completion and workover of existing wells, drilling new wells, and advancing its carbon sequestration initiatives.

Management's Perspective

Ryan Smith, Chief Executive Officer of U.S. Energy Corp., commented, "2024 was a defining year for U.S. Energy as we began the development of our newly acquired industrial gas focused assets. Through disciplined execution, we strengthened our financial position, eliminated all outstanding debt, optimized our legacy asset portfolio, and made significant strides in advancing our Montana-based industrial gas project."

Future Outlook

Looking ahead, U.S. Energy plans to scale its operations, execute new drilling and workover programs, finalize its gas processing infrastructure, and advance its carbon sequestration initiatives. The company expects to fund its forecasted activities from cash on hand and existing cash flow from operations, providing further updates throughout the second and third fiscal quarters of 2025.

SEC Filing: US ENERGY CORP [ USEG ] - 8-K - Mar. 13, 2025

data.title: Growth of Malaysian Industrial Sector Eases in January
data.description:
The growth of Malaysia's industrial sector slowed down in January as manufacturing activity increased at a slower rate.

The industrial production index climbed 2.1%, according to the Department of Statistics Malaysia's Wednesday press release.

The figures missed the 2.7% rise predicted by analysts surveyed by Bloomberg and are lower than the 4.6% year-on-year growth in December 2024, according to The Edge.

The manufacturing sector's output increased 3.7%, lower than the 5.8% rise in the previous month. The growth in manufacturing of computers, electronic and optical products was the main driver for the manufacturing sector's increase and it was followed by the manufacturing of oils and fats, the statistics department said.

Moreover, the production of the mining and electricity sector fell 3.1% and 0.1%, respectively.

In connection with the offer of the above securities, the Stabilising Manager(s), or persons acting on behalf of the Stabilising Manager(s) may over-allot the securities, provided that the aggregate principal amount of the securities allotted does not exceed 105 percent of the aggregate principal amount of the securities, or effect transactions with a view to supporting the market price of the securities at a level higher than that which might otherwise prevail. However, stabilisation may not necessarily occur and any stabilisation action, if begun, may cease at any time, but it must end no later than the earlier of 30 days after the issue date of the securities and 60 days after the date of allotment of the securities.

This announcement is for information purposes only and does not constitute an invitation or offer to underwrite, subscribe for or otherwise acquire or dispose of any securities of the Issuer in any jurisdiction.

data.title: VNET Group Plans $400 Million Offering of Convertible Senior Notes
data.description:
VNET Group said Thursday it plans a $400 million offering of convertible senior notes due April 1, 2030.

The company said it intends to use the net proceeds for the capital investment in wholesale internet data center services projects, among other things

VNET shares were down 8.4% in recent premarket activity.

data.title: American Axle & Manufacturing Says Antitrust Waiting Period for Pending Combination With Dowlais Has Expired
data.description:
American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings said Thursday that the applicable antitrust waiting period for its pending business combination with Dowlais has expired.

In January, the company said it agreed to acquire UK-based Dowlais in a $1.44 billion stock-and-cash deal.

The deal is expected to close in Q4, subject to the remaining closing conditions.

data.title: Ørsted Completes First Phase of German Wind Project
data.description:
Ørsted said its Bahren West I onshore wind farm in Germany became operational with a capacity of 50.4 megawatts.

The Danish energy company said in a Thursday release that it is set to commence construction on the 61.6-megawatt Bahren West II project in May.

The completion of the second phase is expected in 2027.

data.title: Boreo's Annual Report for 2024 published
data.description:
BOREO PLC  Stock Exchange release, Annual Financial Report 13 March 2025 at 12:00 EET

Boreo has today, on March 13, 2025, published its Annual Report for 2024. Report is available in Finnish and in English. Annual report comprises Financial Statements, Report of the Board of Directors, Sustainability report, Corporate Governance Statement and Remuneration Report for 2024.  

The Financial Statements are published in accordance with the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF) reporting requirements in XHTML-format in Finnish. According to ESEF requirements, the primary statements have been labelled with XBRL tags and notes have been labelled with XBRL block tags. A reasonable assurance report on ESEF Financial Statements has been provided by an independent auditor.

The Annual Report, the Corporate Governance Statement and the Remuneration Report are attached to this release as PDF files and available at www.boreo.com.

Vantaa, 13 March 2025

Boreo PlcKari NergCEO

Distribution:NASDAQ Helsinki LtdPrincipal mediawww.boreo.com

Further information:

Kari NergCEO+358 44 341 8514

CFO Jesse Petäjä

+358 40 706 9450

Boreo in brief:

Boreo is a company listed on Nasdaq Helsinki that creates value by owning, acquiring and developing small and medium-sized companies in the long-term. Boreo's business operations are organized into two business areas: Electronics and Technical Trade.

Boreo's primary objective is sustainable long-term profit generation. This is achieved with a business model that is based on the acquisition and ownership of great entrepreneurial companies with the ability to generate sustainable long-term earnings growth and strong cash flows.  The profits generated by the portfolio of companies are re-invested back to operations or to acquisitions with attractive expected returns on capital. The decentralized operating structure promoting a culture of ownership and release of entrepreneurial energy is a core pillar of the company's business concept and sustainable earnings growth is ensured through the support and coaching of companies and the personnel.

The Group's net sales in 2024 were EUR 134 million and it employs over 300 people in seven countries. The company’s headquarter is in Vantaa.

Boreo's Annual Report for 2024 published

AttachmentsBoreo_Remuneration report 2024.pdfBoreo_Annual Report 2024_.pdfBoreo_Corporate Governance Statement 2024.pdf

data.title: Remedy Entertainment Plc: Remedy’s Annual Report 2024, Financial Statement, Remuneration Report and Corporate Governance Statement have been published
data.description:
Remedy Entertainment Plc      Stock Exchange Release       March 13, 2025, at 12 p.m. EET

Remedy has published its Annual Report, Financial Statement, Remuneration Report and Corporate Governance Statement for the year 2024.

All documents are attached to this release and are available at the company’s website . https://investors.remedygames.com/financials-and-reports/financial-reports/

In addition to a PDF file, the Financial Statement 2024 is published in accordance with the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF) reporting requirements as an XHTML file (in Finnish). In line with the ESEF requirements, the Group’s primary statements and notes are labelled with XBRL tags. The audit firm KPMG Oy Ab has provided an independent auditor’s reasonable assurance report on Remedy’s ESEF Financial Statements in accordance with ISAE 3000 (Revised).

REMEDY ENTERTAINMENT PLC

Liisa Eloranta, Investor Relations ManagerPhone: +358 50 4334 992Email:

liisa.eloranta@remedygames.com

Remedy Entertainment Plc is a pioneering, globally renowned video game company founded in 1995 and headquartered in Finland with an office in Stockholm, Sweden. Known for its story-driven and visually stunning action games, Remedy has created multiple successful, critically acclaimed franchises such as Control, Alan Wake and Max Payne. Remedy also develops its own Northlight game engine and tools technology that powers its games. www.remedygames.com

Remedy’s Annual Report 2024, Financial Statement, Remuneration Report and Corporate Governance Statement have been published

India's Zomato set for seventh straight decline, losing $2.8 bln in market cap
data.description:
** India's Zomato drops 1.5%, set for seventh straight session of decline

** Stock posts longest losing streak since January, falling ~11% during the period and losing 243.29 bln rupees ($2.80 billion) in market value

** Drop intensified after Reuters, on March 7, reported a retail group filed antitrust case against quick commerce firms ZOMT, Swiggy and Zepto over discounts; ZOMT fell ~4% on March 7

** Avg rating on ZOMT and SWIG at "buy" - data compiled by LSEG

** YTD, ZOMT down 27% vs SWIG's 35% decline

($1 = 86.9500 Indian rupees)

data.title: National Grid awarded $76.4 billion supply chain framework
data.description:
Britain's National Grid on Thursday said it had been awarded two parts of a 59 billion pound($76.36 billion) high voltage direct current supply chain framework to support key energy projects in the UK.

The framework aims to establish long-term partnerships and secure essential equipment for current and future energy needs.

($1 = 0.7726 pounds)
